summary: However, each time the character attempts to cheat

mechanics.name_guess: However, each time the character attempts to cheat
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 101 > npcs > However, each time the character attempts to cheat
mechanics.excerpt: However, each time the character attempts to cheat again during the same game, he must repeat the roll, increasing the target number by each time failed roll means the character has been caught in the act: cheating character may also be exposed another character makes an Opposed Test using his own Gambling Skill against the cheater and achieves higher Margin of Success. The Gambling Skill can also be used t0 determine char- acter'$ success in games of chance.
